review_title: You can try it and see for yourself
author: Victor L.
pros: What has been my beneficial feature is the customizable reports of the scheduled work performance.
cons: This tool is abit harder to setup and configure.

description: Overall, my experience with Unifocus has been positive. It made scheduling and labor management much easier and more organized. I especially liked how quickly I could adjust shifts when there were last-minute changes. It saved time, improved team coordination, and helped us stay on top of staffing needs. Some parts of the interface could be more intuitive, but overall, it’s a very useful tool for daily operations.
author: NIKITA K.
pros: What I liked most about Unifocus is how easy it made scheduling and managing shifts. The system helps quickly adjust staff based on daily needs, saving time and reducing mistakes. It improved communication with the team and made labor planning much clearer.
cons: What I liked least about Unifocus was that the interface could sometimes feel a bit outdated. It worked well overall, but a more modern design would make the experience smoother.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Anissia A.
pros: Not a fan of the software. The software is not the most intuitive.
cons: Not a fan of the software. It is not sync with ADP. The benefit calculations for PTO aren't available. Specialized reports are not easily avail.

description: Unifocus has been just what my office needed. Time management tracking, and scheduling have been made easy thanks to Unifocus!
author: Isaac A.
pros: Unifocus helps me track my employees time management all in one place! I enjoy the ease of use through this platform.
cons: I have no complaints about unifocus. It has been great to use, easy to use, and my employees enjoy it.

description: UniFocus is a field service and workforce management platform designed to help businesses streamline job scheduling, dispatching, time tracking, and operational reporting, improving efficiency and customer service.
author: Mohamed H.
pros: Scheduling and dispatch tools allow managers to assign jobs efficiently while considering technician availability, location, and skill sets, enhancing resource utilization.
cons: dvanced customization for workflows, reports, or dashboards may be limited, which can be challenging for businesses with unique operational needs or complex processes.

description: The best software that simplifies workforce scheduling with best user friendly interface and with smooth payroll integration.
author: Ankith T.
pros: The mobile accessibility and enhanced visibility for the employees, efficient scheduling and labor management.
cons: Nothing, everything is fine, just need to improve the lags in interface, overall everything seems to be good.

review_title: Scheduling And Performance Tracking made easy
description: So far, I find it the best when it comes to time tracking and scheduling and of course, it is users friendly.
author: Andei O.
pros: The ease in scheduling and changing of my weekly activities and of course, being able to swap shifts at my comfort, I can give a five star for that...Kudos
cons: I wish I don't have to navigate in and out of the tabs when ever I need to fix an error. plus lately, I've been experiencing a few crashes...can't tell if it's from my own end.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall experiences great love the app we use it more definitely recommend it Just need some More work
author: Joshua W.
pros: I like most about this is value for money The customer support It throws in some learning curves It tracks your time Easy to form furiations on
cons: I don't like the scheduling and payroll most of all Poor running system Could be better Services also
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Noy F.
pros: The customer service and the fast response they helped me and guide me with all the questions I had thank you
cons: So the least I liked is the waiting time but it’s ok I’m not worried about it because the service is great
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: This app has potential but it has a long way to go
description: mid. has potential but currently very frustrated. unexceptional
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love the fact that i can track my hours as an hourly employee and notify managers of any discrepancies. in addition to this i have the possibility to notify managers in advance when i need time off.
cons: Unfortunately the app has always been very buggy. however, lately its been much worse. For at least a month now, I have not been able to view my past timecards to check my paystubs. Additionally, the application has no way to notify team-members or anyone that could help from the app developer/company side.

description: Very good and over the course of the years that I have been using it, there have been quite a few updates which have made it easier to use.
author: Sasha S.
pros: I find the most useful features are the attendance management, so tracking when people have called in sick or have been on holiday or going on holiday. The fact that employees can submit holiday request through the app, which streamlines the process and also being able to approve shifts and check when employees have clocked in and out.
cons: The scheduling of employee shifts every month is very time consuming and takes many hours. Although they have features to do automatic examples it does not apply to the business as we have to change shifts very regularly and sometimes last minute.

author: Cindy C.
pros: I like UniFocus' ease of use and that it integrates with our other systems the most.
cons: There is quite a bit of company set up that must be done to take advantage of UniFocus' tools, but it's all worth it.

description: When used properly Watson is a huge time saver for department head and assistant managers as it does much of the schedule writing for them.
author: Greg V.
pros: I really appreciate the ease of use and intuitive UI. It really has the flexibility to accomplish whatever you might need to do and has the ability to really understand real world scheduling.
cons: The training program is a little dense and could be better tiered out. It's a big system to try to teach in one sitting.

author: RodNey B.
pros: Time clocks and labor management synergy
cons: Many of the reports are very difficult to use for the purpose we need them to be used for.

author: Claudia R.
pros: I like the labor management tools that are available on a daily basis. It is a very easy program to use and understand. The forecasting and integration with our other systems is seamless.
cons: Fixing the issue of UniFocus, Snag and DDHP not being able to communicate properly when an employee is not removed in a timely fashion. If an employee is still scheduled in UF after an employee is termed.

description: Its only i suppose, best part is easy use and navigation for the phone app. It is a bit complex for the desktop version but not bad
author: Allyson C.
pros: I like that it's easy to navigate. I work with lots of non-native English speakers as well and access is easy for them and everyone.
cons: My Unifocus crashes on the daily, a few times a day. I can use it for a bit, shut my phone off, then go back to the app and it crashes or logs me out automatically, even though i clicked "remember me" when signing in

description: Overall it is a very user friendly and not time consuming.
author: Jennifer P.
pros: It is very user friendly. The way I can upload/export, all the information into our company's database.
cons: The reports on forecasting. That is only because I have not been properly trained.

review_title: Reports are great unsure about our company's effectiveness using it.
description: I don't have any decision making power on this but for us, it seems silly to have ADP and Unifocus instead of just having one.
author: Edith G.
pros: I run reports on hourly vs salary for weekly report. I like being able to switch between platforms with very little easy and/or change a parameter with ease.
cons: Does not keep track of PTO anymore through Unifocus. It was never correct.

author: Magdalena C.
pros: The product is certainly very useful and helps forecast payroll more accurately.
cons: The system is not always "intuitional" and at times it can be too complicated. I wish certain functions could be automated, e.g. adding new position to labor structure and then to the budget lines too. Reporting could be improved as well - I really miss ability to create my own reports. Some reports contain a lot of data but you only need part of them. Step-by-step manual could be useful too.

description: Auto schedule based on availability is awesome
author: Jodie W.
pros: Ease of use, easily schedule staff based on entered availability
cons: I have not yet found anything that I do not like

review_title: Easy to use and very productive tool/ application.
description: Very helpful experience. It gives the user to forecast and budget as per level of capacity.
author: June W.
pros: The application is very important tool for our forecasting and budgeting.
cons: Accurate database should be always maintained to the full especially we are using job title as main code. No more number code.

author: Claudia C.
pros: Very user-friendly, easy to be at both ends of the process.
cons: I really have no cons to this software (at the level I am using) so the only thing I would bring up is getting the graphics a bit more exciting:)

author: George S.
pros: It’s user friendly and always have updates that improve functionality.
cons: Honestly no cons. I worked with this software for couple years and all the hotels continue to use it.

author: Chris H.
pros: I like that it's very easy to navigate and use.
cons: I think the software is great and I have no issues.

author: Claudia W.
pros: Easy to navigate and very useful to have timing and attendance under control.
cons: Not able to remove the lunch break from the schedule.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
